title: $display causing abort with PLI
body:
I'm driving signals through the VPI e.g.

vpi_put_value(wr_handle, &val, &delay, vpiInertialDelay || vpiForceFlag);

and in the Verilog testbench it runs fine if I don't use $display. I can use $display before initialising the VPI/PLI code. But if I use $display during the simulation I get a seg fault.

```
Program terminated with signal SIGABRT, Aborted.
#0  0x00007f519b5b0428 in raise () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6
(gdb) bt
#0  0x00007f519b5b0428 in raise () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6
#1  0x00007f519b5b202a in abort () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6
#2  0x00007f519b5a8bd7 in ?? () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6
#3  0x00007f519b5a8c82 in __assert_fail () from /lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6
#4  0x00000000004b93fb in vpi_put_value (obj=<optimized out>, vp=vp@entry=0x7ffc1c6a8790, when=when@entry=0x7ffc1c6a87a0, flags=flags@entry=1) at vpi_priv.cc:1062
#5  0x00007f519b367280 in vcdread_changes () at vcdr_pli.c:362
#6  0x00007f519b367707 in vcdr_misc (data=<optimized out>, reason=10, paramvc=<optimized out>) at vcdr_pli.c:564
#7  0x00000000004b3135 in sync_cb::run_run (this=0x1d0e490) at vpi_callback.cc:319
#8  0x000000000048ab4e in generic_event_s::run_run (this=0x71d510 <generic_event_heap+1456>) at schedule.cc:502
#9  0x000000000048cf68 in schedule_simulate () at schedule.cc:1183
#10 0x0000000000444584 in main (argc=<optimized out>, argv=0x7ffc1c6a9b38) at main.cc:501
 
```

Apart from this I have the PLI based VCD replay from http://chris.spear.net/pli/ working in Icarus. I'd like to resolve the $display issue then Chris could make the package available.

I've attached the demo. To see it running without the seg fault comment out `$display("hello"); `in tb_read.v Any hints much appreciated!

[vcdr2.tar.gz](https://github.com/steveicarus/iverilog/files/669956/vcdr2.tar.gz)
